description: Command frontmatter is missing the required `name` field; command discoverability and registration may fail in strict plugin systems.
suggested_fix: Add `name: docs` to the frontmatter block.

description: Command calls MCP tools `resolve-library-id` and `query-docs` but declares no `allowed-tools` frontmatter field; hosts enforcing tool allowlists will reject the calls.
suggested_fix: Add `allowed-tools: [resolve-library-id, query-docs]` to the frontmatter block.

description: MCP server configured as external HTTP endpoint (https://mcp.context7.com/mcp); all tool calls route over the network to a third-party service.
suggested_fix: Document in README that all queries are sent to mcp.context7.com so users are aware of data-sharing implications.

description: MCP server configured as external HTTP OAuth endpoint (https://mcp.context7.com/mcp/oauth); same external data-routing concern as the Claude plugin variant.
suggested_fix: Same README disclosure as the Claude plugin variant.

description: All devDependencies use ^ (caret) ranges allowing minor/patch version drift on reinstall, which could pull in undiscovered vulnerabilities.
suggested_fix: Enforce --frozen-lockfile in CI install steps to pin the lockfile-resolved versions.

description: All production dependencies use ^ ranges (e.g. commander ^13.1.0, open ^10.1.0) allowing minor version drift in CLI distribution.
suggested_fix: Pin exact versions for production dependencies or enforce --frozen-lockfile in the publish pipeline.

description: Agent has zero <example> blocks; R09 requires minimum 2 with Context + user message + assistant response for reliable triggering.
suggested_fix: Add at least 2 <example> blocks showing a user asking a library question and the agent resolving + fetching docs.

description: Agent has zero <example> blocks; same issue as the Claude plugin variant.
suggested_fix: Add at least 2 <example> blocks matching those added to the Claude variant.

description: Agent body lists response content (direct answer, code examples, links) but provides no formal output template; response structure will vary between invocations.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Output Format section with a markdown template showing the exact heading/section structure.

description: Same missing output template as the Claude plugin variant.
suggested_fix: Add the same ## Output Format section as the Claude variant.

description: Agent frontmatter has no `model` field; the equivalent Claude plugin agent declares `model: sonnet`, indicating this was an oversight during copy.
suggested_fix: Add `model: sonnet` to frontmatter to match the Claude plugin agent.

description: Command takes a required <library> argument but specifies no behavior when $ARGUMENTS is blank — no error message or default behavior defined.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Empty Input section: e.g. 'If no library is provided, respond: Usage: /context7:docs <library> [query]'.

description: Command states 'Results include code examples and explanations' but defines no structured output template; format varies between invocations.
suggested_fix: Add a ## Output Format section with a template: library name, version, code snippet block(s), explanation text.

description: Five vague quantifiers: 'concise' and 'actionable' (L11), 'focused' (L5), 'relevant' (L26), 'appropriate' (L24).
suggested_fix: Replace 'concise' with 'under 150 words', 'actionable' with 'includes a runnable code example', 'relevant' with 'matching the user's question topic'.

description: Same five vague quantifiers as the Claude plugin agent (identical content): 'concise', 'actionable', 'focused', 'relevant', 'appropriate'.
suggested_fix: Same fixes as the Claude agent variant; both files must be updated together.

description: Two vague quantifiers: 'best' and 'relevant' both on L33 ('finds the best matching library', 'documentation relevant to your query').
suggested_fix: Replace 'best matching' with 'highest benchmark score and closest name match'; replace 'relevant to' with 'matching the text of'.

description: Three vague quantifiers: 'better' (L30 and L55) and 'closest' (L39).
suggested_fix: Replace 'better documentation quality' with 'higher benchmark score'; replace 'closest name match' with 'exact or prefix match'; replace 'better results' with 'more targeted results'.

description: Same three vague quantifiers as the Claude plugin SKILL.md (identical content): 'better' (L30, L55), 'closest' (L39).
suggested_fix: Same fixes as the Claude plugin variant; all three SKILL.md copies must be updated together.

description: Same three vague quantifiers as the two plugin SKILL.md copies (identical content): 'better' (L30, L55), 'closest' (L39).
suggested_fix: Fix in the canonical skills/ copy first, then propagate to both plugin directories.

description: Two vague quantifiers: 'best' (L50, 'use the best result you have') and 'closest' (L101, 'Use the closest match to what the user specified').
suggested_fix: Replace 'best result' with 'highest-scored result'; replace 'closest match' with 'matching or nearest version string'.

description: Four vague quantifiers: 'best' (L50), 'most relevant match' (L80), 'closest match' (L101), 'relevant details' (L116).
suggested_fix: Replace 'best result' with 'highest-scored result'; 'most relevant match' with 'match with highest benchmark score'; 'closest match' with 'matching version string'; 'relevant details' with 'library name and query'.

description: plugin.json has no `version` field; R48 marks version as recommended and R50 requires it to be bumped in four places on every release.
suggested_fix: Add `"version": "<current-release-version>"` to plugin.json and establish a release checklist covering all four bump points.

description: skills/context7-mcp/SKILL.md is byte-for-byte identical across plugins/claude/context7/skills/, plugins/cursor/context7/skills/, and skills/ — any fix requires three identical edits, making drift likely over time.
suggested_fix: Maintain one canonical copy under skills/ and reference it from plugin directories via symlink or explicit scope note; or add a scope note in each copy pointing to the canonical source.

description: Cursor agent is a copy of the Claude agent but is missing the `model: sonnet` frontmatter field present in the original, the first visible sign of copy-paste drift between plugin variants.
suggested_fix: Add `model: sonnet` to the Cursor agent frontmatter and establish a diffing step in the release process to catch cross-plugin parity gaps.
